customers_say: Customers find this water purifier to be a very good product with reliable RO filtration and professional installation. They appreciate its value for money, great taste, and appearance, with one customer noting its premium matte finish. The purifier is easy to maintain and hassle-free. However, several customers report issues with water leakage from the unit.

reviews.author: Gaurav
reviews.title: Good product, can go for it...
reviews.body: I was looking for a RO for my home and came to know about native RO on urban company app. After some research on Google and watching some youtube videos i finalized this product and waited for the Amazon sale. Now it's about an month I am using this RO and based on that I list some of its pros and cons. Pros: 1. Delivery by Amazon and installation service by UC was fantastic, no complains about that. Installation person was a thorough professional. 2. Water filtration is good. TDS meter is provided with the RO. 3. RO is sleek and can blend easily with any kitchen. 4. Unconditional warranty for

reviews.author: viswanath
reviews.title: Best in best budget
reviews.body: Really best product with in the budget installation also very smooth.overall value for the money.

reviews.author: Ghintoxon Shamaddar
reviews.title: Good purchase. A few add ons would have been nice
reviews.body: Good buy. Worth the cost. Satisfied after using for a couple of weeks. Installation was also seamless. Urban Company picked up the details from the sales and set up schedule for the technician to install the machine with multiple sms with option to reschedule. The technician was also extremely competent to install the machine. The water quality has improved a lot which is evident from the taste of the water. The TDH meter supplied with the purifier also shows the marked difference. The company could have added a cover in the package which I had to purchase separately from Amazon. And also a ou

reviews.author: Asish
reviews.title: Native M0 Water Purifier
reviews.body: Good product and post filtration water TDS level is excellent. Installation was bit delayed but installation quality is good.

reviews.author: Comet A
reviews.title: Value for money with peace of mind
reviews.body: Good product and great service. The installatiom was perfect as promised. The size of the equipement if also great. Technician was professional and explained everything well about the filtration and warranty service. This is one of best RO featuring all filters covering in the warranty and the same can be renewed for ever 2 yrs without any nunber of water capacity limit which is there in other RO. There is no leakage which was checked and prefected.
